             +---------------+
             |  API Gateway  |
             +-------+---+---+
                     +---+
+------------------------o--------------+
|  Service Layer         |              |
|                        |              |
|                        v              |
|               +----------------+      |
|               |  User Service  |      |
|               +--------+-------+      |
|                        |              |
|              +---------+-----+        |
|              |               |        |
|              |               |        |
|              v               |        |
|     +-----------------+      |        |
|     |  Order Service  |      |        |
|     +--------+--------+      |        |
|              |               |        |
|              |               |        |
+--------------o---------------o--------+
               |               |
               |               |
               |               |
               ++              |
+---------------o--------------o--------+
|  Data Layer   |              |        |
|               |              |        |
|          +----+              v        |
|          |             /-----------\  |
|          |             |  User DB  |  |
|          |             \-----+-----/  |
|          |                   |        |
|          |                   |        |
|          v                   |        |
|   /------------\             |        |
|   |  Order DB  |             |        |
|   \------+-----/             |        |
|          |                   |        |
|          +---------+---------+        |
+--------------------o------------------+
                     |
                     |
                     |
                     v
          +--------------------+
          |  Response Builder  |
          +--------------------+
